name: current-major-exact
note: remote is on the exact current major.minor this build speaks

name: current-major-higher-minor
note: a higher minor within the current major is additive/back-compatible

name: current-major-is-newest-spoken
note: newest spoken major (2) is current; a 2.x remote reads as-is

name: speaks-order-independent
note: the newest value in speaks is current regardless of list order
